title: CashFlowTrend
description: Cash flow trend information, broken down by a specific frequency, for a  specific date range.

cashInFlow.description: Total Cash Inflow Amount in the selected duration, which is the sum  of cash inflow in each of the selected months in the duration.

cashOutFlow.description: Total Cash Outflow Amount in the selected duration, which is the  sum of cash outflow in each of the selected months in the duration.

transferIn.description: Total Transfer-In Amount in the selected duration, which is the sum  of transfer-in amount in each of the selected months in the duration.

transferOut.description: Total Transfer-out Amount in the selected duration, which is the sum  of transfer-out amount in each of the selected months in the duration.

netTransfer.description: Net Transfer Amount in the selected duration, which is the difference  between transfer-In and tranfer-out amount

averageNetCashFlow.description: Average net cash flow = Total Cash Flow Amount / Number of months  in the duration.

totalCashFlow.description: Total Cash Flow Amount = Cash Inflow Amount - Cash Outflow Amount +  Net Transfer.

detail.description: Breakdown of income/spending based on a predefined frequency - typically, monthly.
